brick: bpe-tokenizer (BPE merge core) crosses three-way -> four-way
author: Sema (Opus 4.8) — sema-native-ml-walk autonomous run
claim: The byte-pair-encoding merge core (bpe-encode) — the TOKENIZER, the one named-missing piece of the autoregressive generation loop — is lifted from three-way (Go/Rust/TS) to the four-kernel floor (+ fkwu). The recipe is UNCHANGED; the band is strengthened from a single real-anchor claim to five strange-minimal BPE laws, and the band is registered in form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
north_star: A model whose weights AND tokenizer are recipe data, running on a Form-native kernel. The decode math is four-way and on the M4 GPU (multi-layer stack #3423/#3424, KV-cached decode #3412, greedy argmax #3402); the tokenizer turns text into the token ids that loop consumes. Lifting bpe-encode to four-way puts the text->ids front-end on the same proven floor as the decode loop, one stone toward the first end-to-end native token.
recipe: form/form-stdlib/bpe-tokenizer.fk (unchanged) — bpe-rank / bpe-merged / bpe-min-rank / bpe-merge-at / bpe-encode. Pure list/int recursion; merge table is DATA (rows: left-id right-id merged-id rank). Finds the minimum-rank adjacent pair, merges its first occurrence, repeats to fixpoint — converges to GPT-2's merge-all-occurrences encoding.

claims.bit_1_real_anchor: byte-mapped ' tokenizer' against the actual openai/whisper-tiny tokenizer (50258 vocab, 50000 merges) -> token ids [14862, 6545], bit-for-bit the reference tokenizer.
claims.bit_2_base_case: a single symbol [42] is its own encoding (len<2, no adjacent pair).
claims.bit_4_no_merge: [5 6 7] with no matching table row passes through unchanged — the engine never invents a merge.
claims.bit_8_lowest_rank_first: with (10,11)@rank5 and (11,12)@rank2 both mergeable, rank2 merges FIRST -> [10,21], NOT rank5-first -> [20,12]. Order matters: the determinism law that keeps two correct kernels tokenizing identical text to identical ids.
claims.bit_16_full_collapse: (1,2)@0 then (4,3)@1 iterate to a SINGLE token [5] — fixpoint, not one pass.

proof.divergence: 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample

fourth_arm_subset: Pure list/int recursion (eq/and/lt/cons/head/tail/nth/len), no host I/O, no floats (so no scientific-notation literal risk), small tables — well within fkwu's covered subset; far below the table-capacity wall that segfaults the assembled-block bands.
lane: Cheapest-brick lane (matches 3i/3j/3k/3n): recipe + reference-pinned band already existed three-way; the work was strengthening the characterization (5 strange-minimal BPE laws) + one manifest row + confirming fkwu carries the op families. Design was the cost; the four-way proof was seconds.
read_the_body: Found bpe-tokenizer.fk already existed (the whisper BPE merge core proven against the REAL tokenizer) but was NOT registered for the fourth arm — a real three-way gap, not a re-impl. Same pattern as the llama numerics / RoPE / KV-cache before they were lifted.
named_next_stones: wire the full generation loop: bpe-encode (prompt -> ids) + multi-layer decode stack (#3423/#3424) + greedy argmax (#3402) -> the first end-to-end native token over real llama3.2:3b GGUF.
the byte->symbol mapping + GPT-2 regex pre-tokenization (word splitting) as Form recipes (currently carrier DATA) — the rest of the tokenizer front-end.
llama's tokenizer is SentencePiece-BPE (score-ranked, not merge-rank) — confirm bpe-encode's rank model covers it or lift the score-ranked variant.
witness_note: Witness read overall:'strained', silences:0 at run start. The persistently-dark 'endpoint_ideas' organ was probed directly this run: GET https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/ideas returns 200 with real idea data — so the witness's endpoint_ideas darkness is its OWN probe path, NOT a real ideas outage. No deploy taken (pure Form band, host-independent; deploy is outside the autonomous guardrails).
